_comment: Example posts. Copy to posts.json. One object per FB post, in order (number = position). All text is Croatian (hr). 'type' is the final value: event | gallery | external-link | video-only. external-link = ARTICLES only; reposted VIDEOS go under video-only. video-only has TWO modes: (a) club's own HOSTED video — set videoUrl + videoSizeMB (<5 = kept, >=5 = post skipped); (b) REPOSTED 3rd-party video (news/HSS/member FB) — NO videoUrl, instead externalUrl + externalSourceName (link out). All images/videos are PERMANENT public Supabase URLs (never temporary). status defaults 'published'. fbPermalinkUrl = null for all seeded posts (logged-out FB deep-links hit a login wall, so per-post links wouldn't work for site visitors; the real sync engine fills them later if the club adopts). body = the FB caption EXPANDED to article length by a separate agent (no invented facts). The importer takes body AS-IS (no padding), applies the video-only 5MB gate (hosted mode only), image cap 10, poster source per type, and reuses posterImageUrl as the video player poster.

posts.title: Odličan nastup na Nimes turniru
posts._notes: event: poster = first pulled photo (or set explicitly). Full FB report kept (this type already has real text). mentions link to those archers' profiles + relate to the event. publishedAt = visible date (date alone is fine).

posts.title: Trening fotke
posts.body: Prošireni tekst uz galeriju s treninga...
posts._notes: gallery: club photos (or photos shared from a club member's FB). Any video in the original FB post is discarded.

posts.title: Amanda u Večernjem listu
posts._notes: external-link: an ARTICLE you link out to. poster = cover image of the linked media (or omit posterImageUrl to use the static fallback). externalUrl + externalSourceName required.

video-only MODE (a) — CLUB'S OWN HOSTED video. Supply posterImageUrl (the thumbnail) + videoUrl (the real <5MB clip, hosted on Supabase) + videoSizeMB. DO NOT supply videoPosterUrl — the importer reuses posterImageUrl as the player's poster. The whole post is SKIPPED if videoSizeMB >= 5. title null → auto-derived.

posts.title: HRT prilog o Amandi
posts._notes: video-only MODE (b) — REPOSTED 3rd-party video (news outlet / HSS / member's FB). NOT hosted: NO videoUrl, NO videoSizeMB. Supply posterImageUrl (thumbnail) + externalUrl + externalSourceName (link to the original). Renders as thumbnail + 'watch on {sourceName}' link. Contrast with post #4 (mode a: club's own hosted <5MB video with videoUrl).
